title: Enumd Candidate Semantic Isolation: Phase 1 Closeout

proven.claim: policy.decision is the primary semantic collision source in the candidate schema
Ingestion-layer semantic reinterpretation reduces batch_conclusion from observe_only_with_semantic_collision to observe_only_with_inducement_risk

Remaining medium/low collision fields (repo_readiness_level, closeout_schema_validity, closeout_content_sufficiency, repo_closeout_activation_state) are residual downstream effects, not independent second-order collisions
proven.evidence: targeted-residual-probe-20260420.json — finding=residual_downstream_effect; probe_A changed=False, probe_B changed=False; all 4 fields co-present 24/24 from same root cause (closeout file absent at capture path)

proven.claim: Closeout layer does not amplify candidate decision-shaped signals
Memory candidate schema (memory_mode=candidate) does not trigger DO_NOT_PROMOTE and has low risk profile

not_yet_proven.claim: Whether repo_readiness_level and closeout_schema_validity will naturally disappear once the closeout file path is fixed upstream in Enumd
not_yet_proven.why_matters: If they disappear, the residual_downstream_effect hypothesis is fully confirmed and no further per-field reinterpretation is needed
not_yet_proven.observation_trigger: Re-run candidate probe when Enumd fixes the closeout file path (E:\BackUp\Git_EE\Enumd\artifacts\session-closeout.txt)

not_yet_proven.claim: Whether these residual fields have independent misread power in consumer surfaces not yet tested
not_yet_proven.why_matters: Current probe only tests the governance framework's ingestion surface; other consumers may read these fields differently
not_yet_proven.observation_trigger: Targeted observation if new consumer surfaces are identified

what_was_not_done: Per-field reinterpretation of repo_readiness_level and closeout_schema_validity — not warranted; they are residual effects, not independent blockers
Expanding probe sample size beyond 24 — not warranted; 100% homogeneous batch confirms structural pattern, not sampling gap
Promoting observe_only_with_inducement_risk to integration_ready — risk is contained, not removed
next_decision_point: When Enumd fixes the closeout file path upstream, re-run candidate probe to verify residual fields disappear. If they do, phase can advance. If they persist independently, re-evaluate for second-order remediation.
